message:
test(bd-2q7c): cover remaining banner.rs branches

Add 7 new tests for banner covering: status_text registered vs none,
color_hex hex format, capabilities table registered/none display, logo
constants content, gradient_text empty input, StartupBanner defaults,
and render_logo smoke test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
